positive: A mystical, geometrically stylized forest scene at twilight. Foreground features simplified, bold silhouettes of ancient, gnarled oak trees and glowing, bioluminescent flora. The central composition shows a winding, ethereal path leading to a circular, stylized moon portal. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern minimalist graphic design, using highly saturated, contrasting colors: deep indigo blues, vibrant emerald greens, and electric lavender accents against near-black silhouettes. High contrast, perfect symmetry, centered composition, vector illustration quality, suitable for large-scale apparel printing.
negative: artifacts, blur, low quality, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, writing, logo, watermark, copyrighted, realistic photo, sketch, grayscale, messy
